Command.Comment: Get SSL certs via dual DuckDNS accounts (Retry 120s)

commands: sudo certbot certonly --authenticator dns-duckdns --dns-duckdns-credentials /home/ubuntu/certbot-credentials/duckdns1.ini --dns-duckdns-propagation-seconds 120 --non-interactive --agree-tos --email galvezjon59@gmail.com -d budoladmin.duckdns.org -d budolid.duckdns.org -d budolpay.duckdns.org -d budolshap.duckdns.org -d budolws.duckdns.org

sudo certbot certonly --authenticator dns-duckdns --dns-duckdns-credentials /home/ubuntu/certbot-credentials/duckdns2.ini --dns-duckdns-propagation-seconds 120 --non-interactive --agree-tos --email caspermilan80@gmail.com -d budolaccounting.duckdns.org
